sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value1 UInt16, value2 Float32, value3 Float64, value4 Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2, value3, value4) VALUES (1, 2, 7.5, NULL, 100), (2, 3, NULL, 6.2, 200), (3, 1, 8.5, 3.3, 300), (4, 5, 5.5, 4.4, NULL), (5, NULL, 6, 2.2, 400);
SELECT value1, covarPopMatrix(value2, value3, value4) AS cov_matrix FROM test_data WHERE (value1 IS NOT NULL) AND (value1 >= 2);
SELECT id, arrayMap(i -> round(i, 2), arrayJoin(covarPopMatrix(value1, value3))) AS cov_pop FROM (SELECT value1, value3 FROM test_data WHERE value4 IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) > 2;

SELECT id, covarPopMatrix(arrayJoin([value1, value2]), value3) AS cov_matrix FROM test_data WHERE value2 >= (SELECT AVG(value2) FROM test_data WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id ORDER BY cov_matrix[1][1] DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, value1, value2, value3, value4 FROM test_data WHERE (value1 IS NOT NULL) AND (value3 > 0.0) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_data SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE value4 IS NULL;
SELECT arrayJoin(covarPopMatrix(value1, value2, value3)) AS cov_matrix FROM temp_data WHERE value1 >= (SELECT MAX(value1) FROM temp_data);
SELECT avg(value3) FROM temp_data WHERE value4 IS NOT NULL AND value4 >= CASE WHEN value1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE value1 END;
